race.description: Evergreen Turf Sdra Country Champs Qualifier (C5)
race.comment: AUTUMN BREAK (5) looks to have this SDRA Qualifier at his mercy. He couldn't quite justify the market fresh in Highway grade but his late work was exactly what you wanted to see. That run should tighten him beautifully and despite the tricky draw, his class should allow him to round them up. BON HOLLER (10) did enough in the preview, chasing hard to just miss, and gets in at the minimum. She's one of the key dangers. CANNY HELL (1) resumes and is stablemate to the favourite. Has been sharpened with two strong trials and has peak figures that measure up. Not without his chance. SOUTHERN DANCER (9) also resumes and has claims if she brings her A-game.
